'''Farfalla's Diamonds''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] located in the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Ruusan system]]. It held the fifth orbital position around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Hoth's Brand]] in the system. Located in the [[Teraab sector/Legends|Teraab sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], it divided space between the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Turpimir (planet)|Turpimir]] and [[Zor Vlahu (planet)|Zor Vlahu]].

It was named after the [[Jedi Lord]] and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Valenthyne Farfalla]].

==Behind the scenes==
The word "farfalla" is the Italian for "butterfly".
